home.heroSubtitle: GemSteps turns chores, learning, meals, and family life into a coin-earning adventure kids actually look forward to.
home.howItWorksSubtitle: One playful loop that makes everyday routines feel like progress.
home.step1Desc: Parents set up chores, learning goals, meals, and rewards — all in one warm place.
home.step2Desc: Kids complete chores, practice math, and master sight words to stack gem coins and keep streaks alive.
home.step3Desc: Trade coins for real rewards you choose together, and save the best moments in the family gallery.
home.featuresSubtitle: From daily chores to weekly meal plans, GemSteps keeps the whole household moving — without the nagging.
home.featureChoresDesc: Assign tasks with custom point values and watch kids own their routines.
home.featureLearnDesc: Bite-sized math practice and sight-word drills with celebrations when kids level up.
home.featureMealsDesc: Plan the week together with AI-powered feedback on healthy, balanced meals.
home.featureCalendarDesc: A shared weekly view that syncs with Google Calendar so no one misses practice.
home.featureRewardsDesc: Pick the rewards that motivate your kid — screen time, outings, or special treats.
home.featureGalleryDesc: Capture the proud moments — completed projects, meals cooked, goals smashed.
home.benefitsDesc: GemSteps brings everything that keeps a family running — tasks, school practice, meals, calendar, and celebrations — into one delightful place.
home.benefit1: Kids build responsibility and learn through play
home.benefit2: Parents spend less time reminding and more time connecting
home.benefit3: Streaks, badges, and coins make everyday moments feel rewarding
home.ctaSubtitle: Create your family in under a minute. Free to get started.
home.footerTagline: Helping families grow great habits, one coin at a time
home.footerCopyright: © {year} GemSteps. Made with care for families.
home.agreeNotice: By continuing, you agree to our <terms>Terms</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

legal.privacyIntro: GemSteps ("we", "our", or "us") helps families track chores, learning, meals, and rewards. This policy explains what personal information we collect from parents and kids, how we use it, and the choices you have.
legal.privacySection1: We collect the information you provide directly: parent and kid names, email addresses, passwords (stored hashed), family invite codes, chores and point values, learning progress (math and sight words), meal plans, calendar events, photos you upload, and reward redemptions. When you sign in with Google we receive your basic profile (name, email, profile picture). We also collect limited technical information — such as IP address, browser type, and session activity — to keep the service secure.
legal.privacySection2: We use your information to operate GemSteps: authenticate you, keep family data separated and private, run the points/rewards loop, generate AI-powered meal feedback and math analysis, sync calendar events you authorize, and send transactional emails. We do not sell your personal information.
legal.privacySection3: GemSteps is intended to be used by families, with children accessing the app under a parent's account and invite. Parents are responsible for creating kid accounts and may view, edit, or delete their child's data at any time from the parent settings. We do not knowingly collect more information from a child than is needed to operate the service (name, age-appropriate learning progress, activity, and any photos uploaded by the family).
legal.privacySection4: We use trusted service providers to deliver the product: Neon (PostgreSQL hosting), Vercel (hosting and image/photo storage), Anthropic (AI meal and math analysis), Resend (transactional email), and Google (sign-in and optional Calendar sync). These providers process data on our behalf under their own security obligations. We do not share family data for advertising.
legal.privacySection5: We keep family data for as long as the account is active. You can delete your account at any time from Settings; when you do, we remove your family's personal data from our production database on a reasonable schedule and from backups on our standard backup rotation.
legal.privacySection6: We use industry-standard protections including TLS in transit, hashed passwords, scoped family access, and role-based permissions. No service is perfectly secure, but we work to protect your data and will notify you of any material incident that affects you.
legal.privacySection7: Depending on where you live, you may have rights to access, correct, export, or delete your personal information. Parents may exercise these rights on behalf of their kids. To make a request, contact us at the address below.
legal.privacySection8: We may update this policy from time to time. When we make material changes we will post the new version here and update the "last updated" date.
legal.privacySection9: Questions? Email us at mingfeiy@gmail.com and we will get back to you.
legal.termsIntro: Welcome to GemSteps. By creating an account or using the app you agree to these terms. Please read them carefully.
legal.termsSection1: You must be at least 18 years old or the age of majority in your jurisdiction to create a parent account. Parents create and manage kid accounts inside their family. You are responsible for keeping your login credentials secure and for the activity that happens in your family.
legal.termsSection2: Use GemSteps only for its intended purpose: helping your family build great habits. Do not upload illegal, harmful, or infringing content, attempt to access other families' data, disrupt the service, or use the service to harass or harm any person, including children in your family.
legal.termsSection3: You keep ownership of the photos, chore names, meal plans, and other content you add to GemSteps. You grant us a limited license to store and display that content inside your family's account so the service can work. You are responsible for the content your family uploads.
legal.termsSection4: GemSteps uses AI (Anthropic Claude) to generate meal health feedback and math analysis. These suggestions are informational and are not medical, nutritional, or educational advice. Use your own judgment as a parent.
legal.termsSection5: We work to keep GemSteps available but we do not guarantee uptime, and the service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We may add, change, or discontinue features.
legal.termsSection6: You can stop using GemSteps and delete your family at any time. We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms or that put others at risk.
legal.termsSection7: To the fullest extent permitted by law, GemSteps and its providers are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising out of your use of the service.
legal.termsSection8: We may update these terms from time to time. Material changes will be posted here with an updated date. Continuing to use the service means you accept the updated terms.
legal.termsSection9: Questions about these terms? Email mingfeiy@gmail.com.

photoStorage.title: Photo storage
photoStorage.description: Choose where your family's photos are stored. Connect your Google Drive and photos go into a folder in your own Drive — they never touch GemSteps' servers.
photoStorage.connectHint: You'll re-authorize Google (the app needs the Drive permission) and we'll create a "GemSteps - <family>" folder inside your Drive.
photoStorage.disconnectHint: Your existing Drive folder and photos stay in your Drive; GemSteps just stops using them for new uploads.
photoStorage.connectFailed: Couldn't connect to Google Drive. Please try again.
photoStorage.reauthorizeFailed: Google didn't grant the Drive permission. Please try again and accept the Drive access request.
